name: Egg Stuffed Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini in half lengthwise and scoop out the pulp, leaving about 1/4 inch of the shell. Set aside.
2. Place the zucchini shells, cut side down, in a large skillet. Add water and simmer until just tender, about 5 minutes. Drain and turn the shells so the cut side is up.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. In another skillet, cook the pulp and tomato in butter until tender, about 3 minutes. Stir once or twice.
5. Add the eggs, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat when just set. Spoon into the zucchini shells and top with cheese.
7. Cover and heat until the cheese melts. Serves 4.
